Emergency Support Contact Me Office Standards Privacy statement More Menu About Paulette is standing up for Erdington Paulette Hamilton was elected as the Member of Parliament for Birmingham Erdington in 2022. She has lived in Erdington for almost 40 years where her children were born and raised. Paulette trained as a nurse and worked at the local Health centre at Warren Farm Road in Kingstanding for several years. Paulette served as a district nurse for 25 years. Paulette is a campaigning Member of Parliament and is proud to work alongside constituents to ensure Birmingham Erdington is a great place to live and work.
